title: Bare Bones Mob Elytras
description: Tired of the normal elytra? Try out this texturepack that changes your elytra to a mob themed elytra!
body:
ABOUT:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This texturepack changes your boring elytra to very cool mob elytras themed like Ally, Vex and much more. Follow for more Texturepack!
